reference: Hi, I seem to have a large bump on my mons pubis. It has been there for two weeks, and the size has not changed whatsoever. There is no pus, no white substance coming out, none of that. It is hard and under my skin. I tried squeezing it to see if anything would happen, but nothing, not even pain. It is just a big lump, and I do not know if it is something I should get checked out, or if it is something that will go away on its own. Help!
